title: Full Overview Enterprise Navigation Redesign

active_mode_behavior.search_parcel: Sets parcel mode and focuses the global parcel search input without expanding the layer rail.
active_mode_behavior.explore_countywide: Sets countywide mode and opens the advanced layer drawer.
active_mode_behavior.model_lab: Sets modelLab mode, opens Model Lab controls, and leaves the research overlay off by default.
active_mode_behavior.save_snapshot: Saves the current mode/map/context first, then switches the Overview to Snapshot Capture mode.

default_overview_cleanup.default_state: Parcel mode with collapsed/slim layer rail, compact command center, large map, adaptive right Intelligence panel, and simple bottom KPI strip.

left_panel_mode_behavior.parcel: Collapsed by default; when expanded, shows parcel-search guidance, selected parcel summary, Focus Map, Save Snapshot, Open Planning Snapshot, and Open Layers.
left_panel_mode_behavior.countywide: Shows compact Map Layers controls with grouped layers and advanced configuration preserved.
left_panel_mode_behavior.modelLab: Shows Model Lab controls, Development Research Signal toggle, Auto by zoom display mode, compact legend, included/excluded feature groups, Save Snapshot, Methodology link, and collapsed advanced map layers.
left_panel_mode_behavior.snapshot: Shows snapshot helper with current captured mode, selected parcel, active layers count, map image status, Save Snapshot, and Open Snapshot Library.

right_panel_mode_behavior.parcel: Shows Selected Parcel Intelligence. Without a parcel, it explains the search workflow; with a parcel, it shows owner/account, zoning, flood, schools, development activity, transportation, utility proxy caveat, and model safety status.
right_panel_mode_behavior.countywide: Shows Countywide Intelligence with total parcels, permit records, development-active parcels, flood review count, active layer context, and internal-only model status.
right_panel_mode_behavior.modelLab: Shows Model Lab Intelligence with current best internal model, overlay status, display mode, aggregate metrics, safety status, metric explanations, and selected research context when clicked.
right_panel_mode_behavior.snapshot: Shows Snapshot Capture with what will be captured, latest snapshot status, saved snapshot count, active layers, selected parcel, and report-builder actions.

search_parcel_flow.selected_parcel_state: Selected parcel appeared in Active Selection and right panel showed parcel facts, zoning, flood, schools, activity, transportation, utility proxy, and internal-only model status.

countywide_flow.right_panel: Countywide indicators and active map context.

model_lab_flow.safe_output: Relative research signal and aggregate metrics only; no exact probabilities, raw model scores, or official parcel classes.

planning_snapshot_compatibility.wording: Planning Snapshot remains the saved map/context/report builder generated from Overview modes.

documentation_updates: README now names Explore Countywide and Snapshot Capture.
Demo walkthrough now uses Search Parcel, Explore Countywide, Model Lab, and Save Snapshot.
Final checklist now verifies Search focus, Explore Countywide layer controls, Model Lab overlay off, and Snapshot Capture.
Two-minute script and higher-up speaking notes now use the updated task-mode language.

validation_results.dev_server: CFS was already running on localhost:3000 and 127.0.0.1:8000; smoke testing reused the active CFS dev stack.

smoke_test_results.save_snapshot_mode: passed: Snapshot Capture displayed captured-evidence guidance.
smoke_test_results.browser_console: Known opaque console error 'r' observed; no new actionable console error identified.

remaining_known_issues: Browser automation needed coordinate-based clicks for some controls because ArcGIS/Next runtime made a few role/test-id clicks slow.
The known opaque console error 'r' remains from prior smoke runs.
Snapshot confirmation can fade before automated checks; Snapshot Capture state and saved snapshot flow were verified.
